x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Service Operations Workspace is the surface where DEX AI insights are presented to agents in context. Without SOW, AI insights are generated but never seen by the people who need them.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate Service Operations Workspace (sn_sow_itom) via the ServiceNow Store. SOW is the recommended interface for DEX AI insights — without it, agents interact with raw table views that lack the contextual AI recommendations DEX provides.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_9e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c26
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Service Operations Workspace is the surface where DEX AI insights are presented to agents in context. Without SOW, AI insights are generated but never seen by the people who need them.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Service Operations Workspace for DEX</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_scope');
    gr.addQuery('scope', 'sn_sow_itsm_cont');
    gr.addQuery('active', true);
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    var active = gr.next();

    if (active) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: 'Service Operations Workspace (sn_sow_itsm_cont) is active',
            finding: 'Service Operations Workspace is active. DEX AI insights — including device health summaries, root cause analysis, and remediation recommendations — are surfaced in context for agents.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: 'Service Operations Workspace (sn_sow_itsm_cont) not found or inactive',
            finding: 'Service Operations Workspace is not active. DEX AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface — agents cannot act on AI recommendations without SOW.'
        };
    }
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>DEX</module>
<number>CHK0006151</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Activate Service Operations Workspace (sn_sow_itom) via the ServiceNow Store. SOW is the recommended interface for DEX AI insights — without it, agents interact with raw table views that lack the contextual AI recommendations DEX provides.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>9e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851c26</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
